message:
refactor(bakeoff,daemon): improve code formatting and test corpus

bakeoff.rs:
- Reformat add_document() and add_query() calls for better readability
- Expand relevance judgments across multiple lines
- No functional changes, purely formatting

daemon/client.rs, daemon/core.rs:
- Minor refactoring for clarity

tests/bakeoff_harness.rs:
- Expand test coverage for evaluation metrics

search modules:
- Small tweaks to embedder and reranker registries
- two_tier_search improvements

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
